assertions.text: Headline states the news in under 12 words with no superlatives
Lead paragraph answers who, what, when, and where without requiring the reader to continue
No marketing language (groundbreaking, must-see, landmark, revolutionary) anywhere in the copy
Output contains at least two tiers of named, specific festivals
Sequencing advice identifies which festivals require world premiere status
Output ends with a concrete Next Step note specifying an immediate action
Opening section names the target platform and makes a specific audience-fit case
Comparable titles section includes at least one title already on the target platform
No generic pitch language such as 'a story that needs to be told' or 'audiences will love'
Email body is under 250 words including sign-off
Screener access is offered concretely, not vaguely
Closing ask is specific: a screener link, a market meeting, or a call
